/usr/bin/g++ -g "CMakeFiles/harmony-test.dir/test/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/harmony-test.dir/test/test_pitch.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/harmony-test.dir/test/test_frequency.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/harmony-test.dir/test/test_note.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/harmony-test.dir/test/test_chord.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/harmony-test.dir/test/test_progression.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/harmony-test.dir/test/test_voicing.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/harmony-test.dir/test/test_note_set.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/harmony-test.dir/test/test_structure.cpp.o" -o harmony-test  libharmony.a _deps/rapidcheck-build/librapidcheck.a
